title: Viewer surfaces external retrieval benchmark summaries
summary: The viewer dashboard and proof page now detect benchmark reports with summary.recall at 10 percent and render external retrieval cards for R@5, R@10, MRR, and NDCG@10. This lets Kage show LongMemEval style evidence retri
body:
The viewer dashboard and proof page now detect benchmark reports with summary.recall_at_10_percent and render external retrieval cards for R@5, R@10, MRR, and NDCG@10. This lets Kage show LongMemEval-style evidence retrieval proof without treating external benchmark JSON as a local gate report.
Evidence: Implemented in mcp/viewer/app.js and synced to docs/viewer/app.js; asset cache query bumped to v=34 across mcp/viewer and docs/viewer HTML.
Verified by: node --check mcp/viewer/app.js; node --check docs/viewer/app.js; local viewer HEAD /viewer/index.html returned 200
